signature.instructions:
True iff the paper proposes, studies, or applies activation steering / steering vectors / representation engineering on LLMs (e.g., CAA, ActAdd, RepE, SAE-based steering, refusal-direction work). False for prompt-based control, RLHF/DPO alignment, model editing (ROME/MEMIT), and classifier-free guidance.

Field descriptions: `title`: Paper title; `abstract`: Paper abstract

fields.description: True iff the paper proposes, studies, or applies activation steering / steering vectors / representation engineering on LLMs (e.g., CAA, ActAdd, RepE, SAE-based steering, refusal-direction work). False for prompt-based control, RLHF/DPO alignment, model editing (ROME/MEMIT), and classifier-free guidance.
